case_number: Criminal Bail Application stands dismissed as not

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 73 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 15.02.2023 Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Advocate for the applicant. M/s Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Soomro and Bahawal-ud-Din Shaikh, Special Prosecutors NAB. Mr. Kareem Bux Janwari, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant, under instructions, does not press instant Criminal Bail Application, however, states that again the new grounds of hardship and statutory delay are available to the applicant and he shall raise the same before the trial Court first by filing fresh criminal bail application before it. Accordingly, instant Criminal Bail Application stands dismissed as not pressed, leaving the applicant at liberty to file fresh criminal bail application before the trial Court on fresh grounds. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
